name: U.A. Blockbacker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｕ．Ａ．</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ウルトラアスリート</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ストロングブロッカー
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Blockbacker". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Blockbacker" once per turn this way. Once per turn, when your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can change their battle positions, and if you do, negate their effects.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Blockbacker". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Blockbacker" once per turn this way. Once per turn, when your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can change their battle positions, and if you do, negate their effects.
eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand) by returning 1 "U.A." monster you control to the hand, except "U.A. Blockbacker". You can only Special Summon "U.A. Blockbacker" once per turn this way. Once per turn, when your opponent Special Summons a monster(s): You can change their battle positions, and if you do, negate their effects.

action: Returns from field to hand for Special Summon
mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Effect Monsters
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
